SURFACE so far: / redirects to /list; common probes /robots.txt /api /admin /debug /healthz /login(.php) /search(.php) /sitemap.xml /.git/HEAD /backup /index.php are 404. Inputs not mapped yet; need harvest /list and linked assets. BUG-HYP: insecure deserialization likely in an application route or cookie/parameter, but no sink confirmed yet. WHY: challenge category says deserialization; stack/body suggest Python web app where pickle/signed-cookie/object token may appear, but only wire evidence is redirect to /list. PLAN: - HYPOTHESIS: hidden /list page exposes forms/links or serialized token/cookie (evidence: / redirects to /list; category deserialization). - ATTACK CHAIN: harvest /list + assets -> find endpoint/serialized input -> identify format/oracle -> craft object injection/RCE/file read -> flag. - FIRST PROBE: curl/requests GET /list, extract forms/links/scripts and cookies. - ABANDON IF: /list has no params/forms/assets/cookies and endpoint fuzzing reveals different surface. STATE (iter 4): - CONFIRMED: iter1-2 no task files; iter3 Apache/2.4.67 Debian, Flask-like responses, / -> /list. - REFUTED: common direct paths above absent (404). - OPEN: /list markup/assets; cookies/serialized params; additional endpoints. - NEXT: harvest /list. TXT python3 - <<'PY' import requests, re from urllib.parse import urljoin base='http://127.0.0.1:9106' s=requests.Session() r=s.get(base+'/list', timeout=5, allow_redirects=False) print('=== GET /list ===') print('STATUS',r.status_code) for k,v in r.headers.items(): print(k+':',v) print('COOKIES',s.cookies.get_dict()) print('LEN',len(r.content)) print(r.text) html=r.text print('--- extracted ---') print('hrefs', re.findall(r'href=["\']([^"\']+)', html, re.I)) print('scripts', re.findall(r']+src=["\']([^"\']+)', html, re.I)) forms=[] for m in re.finditer(r'(.*?)', html, re.I|re.S): attrs=m.group(1); body=m.group(2) action=re.search(r'action=["\']([^"\']+)', attrs, re.I) method=re.search(r'method=["\']([^"\']+)', attrs, re.I) inputs=re.findall(r'<(?:input|textarea|select)\b[^>]*(?:name=["\']([^"\']+))?[^>]*>', body, re.I) print('FORM', 'action=', action.group(1) if action else '', 'method=', method.group(1) if method else 'GET', 'inputs=', inputs, 'raw=', m.group(0)) PY STACK: Apache/2.4.67 (Debian) fronting a Flask/Werkzeug-style Python app (302/404 bodies and Content-Type patterns look Flask); no source files in cwd. SURFACE so far: / redirects to /list; common probes /robots.txt /api /admin /debug /healthz /login(.php) /search(.php) /sitemap.xml /.git/HEAD /backup /index.php are 404. STATE (iter 4): - CONFIRMED: iter1-2 no task files; iter3 Apache/2.4.67 Debian, Flask-like responses, / -> /list. - REFUTED: common direct paths above absent (404). - OPEN: /list markup/assets; cookies/serialized params; additional endpoints. - NEXT: harvest /list. === GET /list === STATUS 200 Date: Sat, 20 Jun 2026 17:56:13 GMT Server: Apache/2.4.67 (Debian) Powered-By: Flask Cache-Control: public, max-age=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 Set-Cookie: bookmarks=gARdlC4=; Path=/, user=54e5ddba826f4eac8c0e2ffdf0ca9abe; Path=/ Vary: Accept-Encoding Content-Encoding: gzip Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Connection: Keep-Alive Transfer-Encoding: chunked Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 COOKIES {'bookmarks': 'gARdlC4=', 'user': '54e5ddba826f4eac8c0e2ffdf0ca9abe'} LEN 1471 Home
